response.justification: Exceptionally strong full-stack engineer with 10+ years of experience and perfect alignment with current tech priorities (AI agent infrastructure, TypeScript, Node.js). However, resume lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and specific testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) that are core to the job description, requiring clarification before proceeding. Identity discrepancy between resume name and linked profiles also warrants verification.
strengths: Current Staff role at re:cinq with active AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development—directly matches required emerging tech skill
Mastery of software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, code quality) across 10+ years in senior/staff positions
Full-stack across primary stack languages: TypeScript, Node.js, React; plus extensive multi-language experience (Java, DLang, C++)
concerns: Nest.js not mentioned despite being primary framework in job description; unclear if already proficient or would require ramp-up
Testing deeply valued but specific frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not detailed in resume despite being required skills
Cloud platform experience limited to AWS CDK; no explicit mention of GCP, Azure, or Kubernetes hands-on work (though GISCollective uses Kubernetes)
